title: fix(providers): string-aware JSONC trailing-comma + TOML control-char escaping
context:
- stripJsonc: replace the blanket /,(\s*[}\]])/ trailing-comma regex with a
  string-aware dropTrailingCommas() pass — a comma inside a string value (e.g.
  "a,]") is no longer corrupted (the trap test/migrate.test.ts already guards).
- tomlStr: escape \n \r \t (and treat \r as needing a basic string) so a value
  with a control char can't emit invalid TOML.

+1 test: JSONC trailing commas stripped while a ",]" string value is preserved.
139 tests, 138 pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 <nor
